what_it_does: Renders a fixed-size 1600x900 HTML slide with a warm full-bleed left zone showing a month-based stage cascade and a right content area with rollout copy, entry-market headings, and grouped market metrics.
observations: Uses Plus Jakarta Sans from Google Fonts and design tokens from /surface/styles/vars.css.
Sets a two-column grid with 42% left zone and 58% right content area.
The left zone contains month ticks, a vertical spine with arrow tip, six absolutely positioned stage labels, and dashed connector lines.
The right side contains an eyebrow, large headline, two triangle-led statements, an ochre section heading, three bronze subheadings, and repeated three-item stat groups.
Includes decorative bottom hatch strip and a circular V mark positioned at the lower right.
CSS comments explicitly frame the left zone as full-bleed and not a card.
standouts: Split composition contrasts a warm timeline zone with a white editorial information panel.
Timeline cascade is built from absolute positioning rather than semantic data structure.
Stats use repeated value-label groups under segment headings.
conventions: Uses CSS custom properties for spacing, color, radius, and type scale.
Keeps all page-specific styling inline in the HTML file.
Uses class-based styling for reusable visual parts and inline styles for individual coordinates.
Follows a static slide/artboard convention with fixed width and height.
Uses concise region comments to label layout sections.
concerns: Fixed 1600x900 dimensions and absolute coordinates make the composition non-responsive.
Stage positions, tick positions, and connector dimensions are encoded as inline styles, which makes structural edits manual.
External Google Fonts dependency affects standalone rendering if network access is unavailable.
Modern CSS color-mix usage may limit compatibility in older browsers.
notes: A static strategy-rollout slide substrate combining a left staged timeline cascade with right-side segment metrics.
questions: Are the month ticks intended to correspond proportionally to the stage positions?
Are the market metric values placeholder content or final copy?
What does the circular V mark represent from this file alone?
purpose_vs_actual: The title states split zone, cascade, and stat groups; the file directly implements those elements.
intention_signals: It appears intended as a visual layout exploration for communicating phased releases and market-entry targets in a calm presentation format.
novelty: A full-bleed warm zone is used as a timeline field beside a dense editorial stats panel, with the cascade carrying the temporal structure.
contribution: Contributes a split-zone presentation substrate with a warm timeline cascade, dashed stage connectors, triangle-led rollout statements, and repeated segment metric groups that could be retained as reusable layout patterns.
summary_for_embedding: Static HTML/CSS presentation slide with a left month-based staged cascade and a right strategic-rollout panel containing entry-market segment stats.
intention_for_embedding: Designed to express phased ecosystem rollout and market-entry targets through a split timeline-and-metrics composition.
